title: vilfa divaricata
intro: Vilfa divaricata, also known as the spreading vilfa or spreading hairgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Vilfa divaricata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to help with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Vilfa divaricata can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, often used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
